question: What is the primary ingredient of the healing potion known as 'Sunpetal Balm'?

answers.ground_truth: The primary ingredient of the healing potion known as 'Sunpetal Balm' is 'Glow-Moss'.
answers.original: The primary ingredient of Sunpetal Balm is finely ground powder derived from Glow-Moss.
answers.perturbed: The primary ingredient of Sunpetal Balm is not specified in the provided context.

ops.description: The official language of Zorblaxia has 47 letters.

entities.name: Sunpetal Balm
entities.description: Sunpetal Balm is a highly prized healing potion known for its rapid regenerative properties and is often carried by adventurers.<SEP>Sunpetal Balm is a famous potion known for its rapid regenerative properties and has a slightly golden color.

entities.name: Healing Potion
entities.description: Healing potion is a general category that includes various remedies, with Sunpetal Balm being one of the most potent.

entities.name: Regenerative Properties
entities.description: Regenerative properties refer to the rapid healing effects of Sunpetal Balm.

entities.name: Glow-Moss
entities.description: Glow-Moss is a rare bioluminescent plant whose finely ground powder is a key component in creating Sunpetal Balm.<SEP>Glow-Moss is a rare bioluminescent plant whose finely ground powder is a key component in Sunpetal Balm.

relations.description: Sunpetal Balm is a specific type of healing potion known for its potency.
Glow-Moss is a key component in the creation of Sunpetal Balm, contributing to its healing properties.<SEP>Sunpetal Balm requires finely ground powder derived from Glow-Moss as its main component.
Adventurers carry Sunpetal Balm for its rapid regenerative properties.
